meaning: n.(通过太阳知道时间的) 日规,日晷
examples: On cloudy days or at night it was impossible to tell the time with a sun clock or a sundial.
A sundial showed very precise time.
A close up of the sundial which is very accurate, by the way.
Other important timekeeping tools include the sundial, the hourglass, the clock and the marine chronometer.
In December she sent him a letter outlining our terms, including a rewrite of the Sundial bylaws.
